trustBadges: Registered with Complementary and Natural Healthcare Council (CNHC)

services.title: Aromatherapy Massage
services.body: Relaxing massage using essential oils for deep relaxation.

services.title: Hot Stone Therapy
services.body: Heated stones placed on key points to relieve tension and stress.

services.title: Deep Tissue Massage
services.body: Targeted massage for chronic muscle tension and pain relief.

services.title: Reflexology
services.body: Pressure points on feet to promote overall wellness and balance.

services.title: Prenatal Massage
services.body: Specialized massage for pregnant women, focusing on comfort and relaxation.

services.title: Sports Massage
services.body: Enhance performance and recovery with targeted muscle work.
